The '''cargo ferry''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] manufactured by [[Kiara Cargo Corporation]].<ref name="XWA" /> It was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] with six engines. The ferry could carry cargo both internally and externally in attached [[Xizor cargo container|containers]], or externally carry captured spacecraft. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] employed such ferries, as did various space [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and civilians.

A cargo ferry was 90 meters long. It required a crew of six to operate. It had three [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]: forward, port, and starboard. It was equipped with [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]].
